response.global_analysis: The video segment captures a talk segment where Roboco showcases her new 3D outfit, followed by the appearance of guest Hoshimachi Suisei and the beginning of their duet of 'I-Aru Fanclub'. Phonetic matching confirms the song, though the provided JSON reference lyrics represent a different verse than the one performed here; transcription follows the actual audio. The reference log incorrectly identifies the guest as AZKi, but audio cues (Roboco calling 'Sui-chan') and visual identification confirm it is Suisei. Timestamps are precisely aligned to vocal activations, with gaps for the instrumental intro of the song.

subtitles.original: 待っててくれました？一瞬だったでしょう？
subtitles.english: Did you wait for me? It was just a split second, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: 嬉しい。可愛い、かっこいい。ね、これなんか両方あるよね。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy. It's cute and cool. Right? It's kind of both.

subtitles.original: かっこいいし可愛いよね。プリティーでクールなの、これ。
subtitles.english: It's cool and cute. It's 'pretty and cool'.

subtitles.original: いっぱい見て、いっぱい見て。足からちょっと見てく？
subtitles.english: Take a good look, take a good look. Shall we start from the feet?

subtitles.original: おー見てーえーやばい。かっこよすぎるんだが。
subtitles.english: Oh, look... Whoa, this is crazy. It's just too cool.

subtitles.original: 見て、これロボット特有のさ、この…人間だったら多分めっちゃ歩きづらいんじゃ？
subtitles.english: Look, this is something unique to robots... If I were human, it would probably be really hard to walk in?

subtitles.original: みんな多分歩けないよね、この靴。僕歩けるんだけどさ。
subtitles.english: No one else could probably walk in these shoes. But I can.

subtitles.original: おーこの靴で多分僕走ったら多分めっちゃ倍こけると思うから、
subtitles.english: Oh, if I tried to run in these, I'd probably fall twice as much, so...

subtitles.original: 歩きます。どう？どう？どう？
subtitles.english: I'll just walk. How is it? How is it? How is it?

subtitles.original: はい、そして上からね。かっこよく決まって、
subtitles.english: Yes, and from the top. Looking cool and sharp—

subtitles.original: ベルトあればあるだけいいですからね。いっぱい付けてもらえました。
subtitles.english: you can never have too many belts, right? I had a lot of them added.

subtitles.original: 今回マジで装飾品もかっこいい。キラキラ。
subtitles.english: The accessories are really cool this time too. So sparkly.

subtitles.original: 金色のネックレス。これダイヤとか雷が付いてるのかな？うん。
subtitles.english: A gold necklace. I wonder if these are diamonds or lightning bolts? Yeah.

subtitles.original: あとなんか姿がちょっとおかしくなってるけど。
subtitles.english: Also, my form is a bit strange right now, but...

subtitles.original: 僕の新衣装に合わせてロボさがイヤリングにいたり。
subtitles.english: Robo-sa is even in my earrings to match my new outfit.

subtitles.original: 新しい丸眼鏡はちょっとクールで装飾品もいっぱい付いてるし。
subtitles.english: The new round glasses are pretty cool with lots of details.

subtitles.original: 何よりこのでっかいお団子かわっちでしょう？
subtitles.english: And above all, these big buns are so cute, right?

subtitles.original: もふもふもふもふ。
subtitles.english: Fluffy, fluffy, fluffy, fluffy.

subtitles.original: 僕毛量多いの大好き。
subtitles.english: I love having lots of hair volume.

subtitles.original: ね、このもふもふ可愛いよね。これ脱げるのかって？えー？
subtitles.english: Right, this fluff is cute, isn't it? 'Can I take it off?' Eh?

subtitles.original: だって指だってまだちゃんと見れてないもんね。
subtitles.english: But you haven't even seen my fingers properly yet.

subtitles.original: 脱げちゃうのかな？あとで。
subtitles.english: I wonder if it'll come off? Later.

subtitles.original: あとでお楽しみにしていください。はい、というわけで…
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it later. Yes, and so...

subtitles.original: でもライブ以来だよ、Colorize衣装来たの。
subtitles.english: But it's been since the live since I wore the Colorize outfit.

subtitles.original: かっこよかったでしょう？ギャル。ね。
subtitles.english: It was cool, right? Totally 'gal'. Right.

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ映えてたよね。うん。燃えんチャコファイヤーもね。
subtitles.english: It looked really great on screen. Yeah. 'Moen Chako Fire' too.

subtitles.original: もう早くエリザベスが3Dモデル出ること僕待ってるから。ピース！
subtitles.english: I'm already waiting for Elizabeth to get a 3D model. Peace!

subtitles.original: でも一緒に歌えてすごく楽しかった。
subtitles.english: But it was so much fun to sing together.

subtitles.original: ありがとねみんな。
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone.

subtitles.original: はい、そして『フォニイ』と『シャンティ』とソロも歌いましたけれども。
subtitles.english: Yes, and I also sang 'Phony', 'Shanti', and a solo.

subtitles.original: 爆上げ、かっこすぎロボ子さん。うん。
subtitles.english: It was hyped up—Roboko is just too cool. Yeah.

subtitles.original: 低音層いますからね。
subtitles.english: I've got that low register, after all.

subtitles.original: ロボ子の低音が大好きすぎる民たち。うん。いつもありがと。
subtitles.english: To my fans who love Roboko's low voice... Yeah. Thanks as always.

subtitles.original: すごく嬉しい。僕も気持ちよく歌いました。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy. I felt great singing too.

subtitles.original: あ、ところでステージがなんか進化して
subtitles.english: Oh, by the way, did you notice the stage evolved

subtitles.original: ドラゴンくんが生まれてたの気づきました？こいつどこから来たんやお前ね。
subtitles.english: and a Dragon-kun was born? Where on earth did you come from, you?

subtitles.original: ロボさん食われちゃいそうだよね。うん。一回ロボさんをドラゴンの口の中に入れてみようかな？
subtitles.english: Looks like Robo-sa is about to be eaten. Yeah. I wondered if I should try putting Robo-sa in the dragon's mouth?

subtitles.original: ちょっと悩んだ。
subtitles.english: I thought about it for a bit.

subtitles.original: でも入れなかった。僕えらい！
subtitles.english: But I didn't. I'm such a good girl!

subtitles.original: うわ、あいつの上に乗下りすぎるだろう。うん。
subtitles.english: Whoa, I want to ride on top of him so badly. Yeah.

subtitles.original: というわけでですね。
subtitles.english: So, anyway...

subtitles.original: もう次の歌も歌いたいんですけれども。
subtitles.english: I want to sing the next song soon.

subtitles.original: せっかくこの衣装なので。
subtitles.english: Especially since I'm in this outfit.

subtitles.original: なんかゲストの中にめちゃチャイナしやーる奴がいるらしいんですよ。
subtitles.english: I heard there's someone very 'China-esque' among the guests.

subtitles.original: 歌っちゃおうかな？
subtitles.english: Shall we sing?

subtitles.original: ね、ドラゴンくん？歌いたいよね？ね？
subtitles.english: Right, Dragon-kun? You want to sing, don't you? Right?

subtitles.original: 「あー、歌いたい！」って言ってる気がするんで。
subtitles.english: 'Ah, I want to sing!' I feel like that's what he's saying.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、早速呼んでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: So, let's call her out right away!

subtitles.original: す、す、すいちゃーん！
subtitles.english: Sui-, Sui-, Suichan!

subtitles.original: ロボ子ー久しぶりー！お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Roboko, long time no see! Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: すいちゃんありがとー！ね、見て見て、新衣装！
subtitles.english: Suichan, thank you! Hey, look, look! My new outfit!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ可愛い！めっちゃ可愛い！
subtitles.english: It's so cute! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: 一緒に『いーあるふぁんくらぶ』歌おう！
subtitles.english: Let's sing 'I-Aru Fanclub' together!

subtitles.original: いいよ！
subtitles.english: You got it!

subtitles.original: 神戸 中央区 元町駅前
subtitles.english: In Kobe, Chuo ward, Motomachi station front

subtitles.original: 今日から ドキドキ ニーハオ講習会
subtitles.english: Starting today, a heart-pounding Nihao workshop

subtitles.original: 大人 中高生 おばあちゃんに
subtitles.english: To adults, middle and high schoolers, and grandmas,

subtitles.original: 「こんにちは」
subtitles.english: Hello!

subtitles.original: ダメダメ ここでは あなたも ニーハオ
subtitles.english: No, no—everyone here says 'Nihao' too!

subtitles.original: ニーハオ！
subtitles.english: Nihao!

subtitles.original: マジでテキスト三ページ
subtitles.english: Seriously, three pages into the textbook,

subtitles.original: 早くも…
subtitles.english: Already...
